title: beads (bd) not installed; agent fell back to built-in Task tools
evidence: _agent_stdout.log — agent probed PATH/pip/npm for `bd`/`beads`, found none, and reported tracking subtasks with Task tools instead. No .beads/ dir in run_dir.
suggestion: Install bd on the runner if the beads tooling factor is meant to take effect; otherwise this cell measures the no-tooling fallback, not beads.
